productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Colroy White Blue Shoe
description: CLEAN RIDE, GREAT FitConstructed with an impressive slick design, the adidas AdiSTAR Salvation II is probably one of those very few running shoes that doesn’t have any garish colours. A neat, well presented design in a white base with classy navy blue and green trim, the adidas AdiSTAR Salvation II is equally loved as a daily wear footwear too.The Adidas AdiSTAR Salvation II has been tried and tested under extreme conditions and the final result has proved that it has minimal wear and tear, all set to last for years on end even with regular use. With a FORMOTION heel unit and pro-moderator guarantee, the shoe employs cushioning at its best, offering absolute comfort and tractional stability ensuring a controlled running experience even during long runs. Many users of the Adidas AdiSTAR Salvation II vouch for its comfort and stability and say that they can run in it for hours on end without feeling any stress or strain on the legs or feet.Overpronate and underpronate without worryOffering that fantastic stability for overpronators and underpronators, the Adidas AdiSTAR Salvation II is a premier stability shoe. Added to this superior comfort is the midfoot stretch panel that wraps around the foot adding to the comfort, stability and protection that this just about 386 grams heavy shoe offers.With a meshed upper and synthetic overlays adding that support and stability, the Adidas AdiSTAR Salvation II shoe offers ample ventilation and breathability to the feet. Nice and airy, the feet are kept dry, cool and comfortable making it an absolute pleasure to wear for marathons.Wash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine wash
